zh.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butler是John Knight的女兒，於1383年2月21日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓。她和John Gerard至少有1個女兒。她去世於1442年2月27日在英國英格蘭爾金斯利享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butler was born on 21 February 1383, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Knight. She had at least 1 daughter with John Gerard. She died on 27 February 1442, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butler est née le 21 février 1383, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John Knight. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec John Gerard. Elle est décédée le 27 février 1442, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butler wurde am 21. Februar 1383 in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von John Knight geboren. Sie hatte mit John Gerard mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. Februar 1442 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butler è nata il il 21 febbraio 1383 nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di John Knight. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con John Gerard. Morì il 27 febbraio 1442, nel Kingsley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butlerは1383年2月21日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでJohn Knightの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn Gerardとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1442年2月27日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butler(은)는 1383년 2월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 John Knight의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John Gerard(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 2월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨그슬리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Butler родилась 21 февраля 1383 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John Knight. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от John Gerard. Она умерла 27 февраля 1442 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.
